input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.3.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.3.2.1
            TITLE: the brake pedal must be one of:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.3.2.1: The Brake Pedal must be one of:
T.3.2.1 The Brake Pedal must be one of:  
• Fabricated from steel or aluminum  
• Machined from steel, aluminum or titanium

final_answer: T.3.2.1 The Brake Pedal must be one of: • Fabricated from steel or aluminum • Machined from steel, aluminum or titanium
